title: Add real-time location detection for Ash
what_failed: Pi cannot determine Ash's current location on demand — no GPS or IP-based location tool exists
suggested_fix: Add a get_location tool that uses IP geolocation (e.g. ipinfo.io) as a fallback, and optionally reads GPS from a mobile source if available via Telegram bot context
resolution: AwarenessTools.get_location() already existed with ipinfo.io fallback chain. Added _handle_get_location handler and get_location ToolSpec to tools/tools_awareness.py TOOLS list. Pi can now call get_location as a tool on demand. verify.py PASS.
